failureReasons: content-non-empty: expected >=200 visible chars and >=120px of painted content, observed 144 chars and 876px — "ERROR rate over time ERROR lines from logs/app.log, bucketed in 10-minute intervals. ERROR count per 10-minute bucket 09:00 09:10 09:20 09:30 09:40 09:50 0 3 6 ..."

artifact.source:
ERROR rate over time

Application log logs/app.log covers one hour (09:00–10:00) with 1042 total requests and 22 ERROR lines, an overall error rate of 2.1%. Errors are clustered mid-window, driven by a pricing upstream outage that tripped the circuit breaker around 09:33 and recovered by 09:40.

The 09:30 bucket carries the heaviest load, with 11 ERROR lines as the pricing upstream became unreachable (econnrefused) and the circuit breaker opened, returning 503s until it closed again near 09:40.
